            tbm_grant_air_fighters_y1950 = yes
        }
    }
}

# -- AIR / HEAVY_FIGHTERS (8 techs) --

# iw_medium_airframe
#   year=1926 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_airframe
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_airframe
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_airframe
#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_medium_airframe
#   year=1945 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[jet_engines]

tbm_grant_air_heavy_fighters = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_fighters

            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1924 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

# -- AIR / TACTICAL_BOMBERS (12 techs) --

# ww1_early_bomber
#   year=1914 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# early_ww1_early_bomber
#   year=1914 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_bomber
#   year=1916 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# early_basic_bomber
#   year=1916 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_bomber
#   year=1918 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# early_improved_bomber
#   year=1918 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# early_bomber
#   year=1928 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber1
#   year=1945 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[jet_engines]

# jet_tactical_bomber2
#   year=1950 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tactical_bombers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1914 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1916 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1928 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1928 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1950 = yes
        }
    }
}

#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_strategic_airlifter
#   year=1945 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# strategic_airlifter
#   year=1948 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

tbm_grant_air_transport = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_transport
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_y1933 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_y1948 = yes
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics

        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.

            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1905 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1905 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # census_tabulating - 1905
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = census_tabulating }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1905 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { census_tabulating = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

#   year=1954 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# dispersed_industry_d
#   year=1954 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# construction_d
#   year=1954 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# excavation_d
#   year=1954 branch=industry_electronics category=industry
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1905 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1905 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1905 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1912 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1912 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1914 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1916 = yes

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1905 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1905 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # bunker - 1905
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = bunker }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1905 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { bunker = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

# -- INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / NUCLEAR (9 techs) --

# atomic_research
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor_heavy_water
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# isotope_separation_centrifugal
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nukes
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuke_naval
#   year=1948 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# thermonuclear_bombs
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nukes_2
#   year=1951 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nukes_3
#   year=1955 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_nuclear
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1948 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1951 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1951 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1955 = yes
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_nuclear
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { nuclear_reactor_heavy_water = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }

# -- INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / RADAR (12 techs) --

# radio_detection
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# cavity_magnatron
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# decimetric_radar
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_decimetric_radar
#   year=1939 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# centimetric_radar
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# phased_array
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# monopulse_radar
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_centimetric_radar
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_centimetric_radar
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# future_radar
#   year=1948 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# future_radar_2
#   year=1951 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# future_radar_3
#   year=1954 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_radar
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1948 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1951 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1951 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1954 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1954 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1946 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1946 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1948 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1951 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1951 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

tbm_grant_land_anti_tank = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1948 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1951 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1951 = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1954 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

# antiair_e

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

tbm_grant_land_artillery = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1905 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_artillery
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1905 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y1905 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y1910 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1912 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y1912 = yes
        }
        if = {

            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y1916 = yes
        }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y1917 = yes
        }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

tbm_grant_land_artillery_y1905 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1905 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_artillery
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # horse_artillery - 1905
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = horse_artillery }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1905 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { horse_artillery = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # artillery5 - 1944

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { artillery5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # antiair_a - 1944

                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

# -- LAND / HEAVY_TANKS (15 techs) --

# basic_heavy_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1940 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech
#   year=1945 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank_a
#   year=1947 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank_b
#   year=1951 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_tanks
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1934 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1947 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1947 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1951 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1951 = yes
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_y1953 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1954 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

tbm_grant_land_light_tanks = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1905 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1905 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1905 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1910 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1914 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1916 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1917 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1920 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1920 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1925 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1925 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1930 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1930 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1934 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1945 = yes
        }
    }

tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1905 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1905 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # eg_early_armored_car - 1905
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = eg_early_armored_car }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1905 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_light_tanks
                NOT = { has_dlc = "No Step Back" }
            }
            set_technology = { eg_early_armored_car = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # early_armored_car - 1905
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_armored_car }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1905 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_light_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { early_armored_car = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

# -- LAND / MECHANISED (7 techs) --

# mechanised_infantry
#   year=1941 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1941 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
#   year=1943 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry2
#   year=1943 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry3
#   year=1945 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry_a
#   year=1948 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry_b
#   year=1951 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

tbm_grant_land_mechanised = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_y1948 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1951 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_y1951 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_mechanised_y1941 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # mechanised_infantry - 1941
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
            }
            set_technology = { mechanised_infantry = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # amphibious_mechanized_infantry - 1941
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { amphibious_mechanized_infantry = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

#   year=1900 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# bicycles

#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_motorised_infantry
#   year=1920 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry
#   year=1935 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# tech_trucks
#   year=1936 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

tbm_grant_land_motorised = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_motorised
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_y1900 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_y1910 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1920 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_y1920 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1935 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_y1935 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_motorised_y1936 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_support = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_y1900 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1905 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_support_y1905 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            tbm_grant_land_support_y1910 = yes

tbm_grant_land_support_y1900 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # rations - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = rations }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { rations = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # tech_support - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_support }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_support = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1910 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1914 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1916 = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1918 = yes

tbm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1910 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # tech_maintenance_company - 1910
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_maintenance_company }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { tech_maintenance_company = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # tech_mortar_company1 - 1910
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_mortar_company1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { tech_mortar_company1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_battleships = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1905 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1905 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1905 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1910 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1914 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_battleships_y1944 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_carriers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_carriers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_carriers_y1944 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_destroyers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1905 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1905 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1905 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1910 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1914 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1905 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

# -- NAVAL / HEAVY_CRUISERS (4 techs) --

# early_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1944 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1922 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            NOT = { has_dlc = "Man the Guns" }
        }
        # early_heavy_cruiser - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_heavy_cruiser }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# ww1_basic_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1910 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# ww1_basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=1910 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# ww1_improved_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1914 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# ww1_improved_cruiser_armor_scheme

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45
